title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Here we go again
The past several weeks has seen a range of economic support measures announced by the Chinese government. Read More

Chinese economic data are the focal point
In a sea full of reds, the forty-seventh trading week painted our screens with few brushstrokes of green at last! Read More

This year is crucial
This year is crucial for the energy mix in European countries, as the EU has imposed new sanctions on Russia.
